fixes_applied: Implemented Optimistic UI (Ghost Card) in Activity Hub for instant feedback.
Fixed reconciliation logic to ensure Ghost Card persists until DB record is confirmed in the list.
Merged Ghost Card into the main timeline for seamless visual transition.
Added fuzzy matching (title + timestamp) for reconciliation as a fallback.
Updated E2E tests to verify Ghost Card persistence across multiple history fetches.
Ensured immediate redirect from Dashboard to Activity Hub.
Generalized status messages to handle multi-platform distribution (e.g., 'Distributing to Platforms').
Removed all chat emojis from user-facing status strings to comply with project mandates.

conditions: Ghost Card appears instantly in Activity Hub after redirection.
Ghost Card persists even if initial poll doesn't return the record yet.
Zero chat emojis in user-facing status messages.

qa-agent.details: Verified Ghost Card persistence and reconciliation. All 5 tests in upload-visibility.spec.ts passed.
